seoTitle: Inglehope vs Inglewood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Inglehope and Inglewood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Inglehope and Inglewood.
heading: Inglehope vs Inglewood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Inglehope, Western Australia and Inglewood, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Inglewood has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Inglehope (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Inglehope or Inglewood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Inglehope has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Inglewood scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Inglehope scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Inglewood scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Inglehope or Inglewood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Inglewood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
